Metadata.title: Website Development in Tashkent for Business | WebCode
Metadata.description: We build landing pages and business websites in Tashkent with CRM, Telegram/WhatsApp, domain, hosting and turnkey launch in one solution.

metadata.title: WebCode | Privacy Policy
metadata.description: WebCode privacy policy for website visitors: what data we collect, how we use it and how to contact us about data processing.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: This page explains what data we may receive through the WebCode website, why we use it and how you can contact us if you have questions about data processing.

data.title: What data we collect
data.body: Through the lead form and direct contact channels, we may receive your name, phone number, Telegram username, business description or any other details you voluntarily send to discuss a project.

purpose.title: Why we use the data
purpose.body: We use this information to contact you, discuss your request, prepare a proposal, organize follow-up communication and make sure incoming leads are not lost in our CRM or internal notifications.

sharing.title: Sharing with third parties
sharing.body: We do not sell personal data. Information may only be processed through services involved in receiving and storing leads, such as CRM tools, Notion, Telegram or WhatsApp, when needed to operate the website and respond to your request.

storage.title: Storage and protection
storage.body: We aim to keep data only for as long as necessary to handle your request and ongoing business communication, and we use reasonable technical measures to limit unauthorized access.

contacts.title: How to contact us
contacts.body: If you want to clarify, correct or delete data you have submitted, message us via Telegram or WhatsApp listed on the website, and we will review the request within a reasonable timeframe.

Hero.eyebrow: For service and expert businesses in Uzbekistan
Hero.subtitle: We make website development in Tashkent practical for business: we build a landing page or business website, connect CRM, Telegram/WhatsApp, domain and hosting, and launch it turnkey.
Hero.description: You get a business website for Uzbekistan with clear structure, commercial copy and a practical launch flow instead of a set of disconnected services.
Hero.supportText: We help choose the right format, refine raw copy, build a landing page or corporate website and launch everything turnkey without unnecessary complexity on your side.
Hero.microcopy: We reply within one business day. We will help you choose the right format and estimate the cost for your business.
Hero.orbit: Website, CRM, Telegram and turnkey launch for businesses in Uzbekistan

Audience.title: Who WebCode is for
Audience.description: We are a fit for businesses that need not just a website, but a clear tool for trust, service presentation and convenient lead capture.

service.title: Service businesses
service.description: Repairs, construction, cleaning, delivery, installation, car services, home services and field services.

expert.title: Expert businesses
expert.description: Clinics, dental practices, cosmetology, education, consulting, private specialists and personal services.

trust.title: Businesses that need trust
trust.description: When the website must look professional and help the client make a decision faster.

leads.title: Businesses that need order in leads
leads.description: When it matters to collect inquiries from forms and messengers in one system instead of losing them in chats.

WhyWebCode.title: Why WebCode
WhyWebCode.description: We build more than just a website. We deliver a launch-ready system: from structure and copy to CRM, messengers and publishing.
WhyWebCode.cta: Launch your project without the extra complexity
WhyWebCode.ctaDescription: We will show which format fits your business and define the next step clearly without technical chaos.

system.title: Not just a website, but a lead system
system.description: Website, forms, CRM and messengers work as one connected solution.

structure.title: Design that stands out
structure.description: We create modern web design that looks premium, reads easily and helps make a strong first impression.

languages.title: 3 languages built in from the start
languages.description: Russian, Uzbek and English are included in the base logic of the solution from the start. We can add any other language on request.

market.title: For the local market
market.description: We account for how businesses in Uzbekistan operate, what clients expect and which communication channels they actually use to reach out.

contractor.title: One contractor
contractor.description: No need to separately look for a designer, developer and specialists for domain setup, hosting and CRM just to make everything work together.

support.title: Support after launch
support.description: After publishing, we help with small edits and questions.

BusinessBenefits.title: What your business gets
BusinessBenefits.description: This is not just an online presence, but a clear system for trust, service presentation and convenient lead capture.
BusinessBenefits.ctaDescription: We will show which website format fits your business and prepare a proposal for your launch scenario.

presentation.title: Professional presentation
presentation.description: The website looks polished and modern so the business inspires more trust from the first impression.

path.title: A clear path to inquiry
path.description: It becomes easier for a client to understand your offer and move toward contacting you.

leads.title: Fewer lost inquiries
leads.description: Forms, CRM and messengers help prevent leads from getting lost in chats and manual follow-up.

services.title: Clear service presentation
services.description: Your services, work format and key advantages are presented clearly without unnecessary confusion.

growth.title: Responsive website
growth.description: The website adapts correctly to modern laptops, tablets and smartphones, so it stays convenient to use on any device.

launch.title: Everything you need is included
launch.description: Domain, hosting, language versions and the core launch setup are already assembled into one clear solution.

SolutionIncludes.title: What is included in the turnkey solution
SolutionIncludes.description: Everything needed for launch is already assembled into one format, so you do not have to coordinate separate contractors and services.
SolutionIncludes.excludedDescription: These items can be discussed separately, but they are not part of the base launch format.
SolutionIncludes.ctaDescription: We will tailor the right solution for your business.

website.title: Turnkey website
website.description: We build a ready website with the required sections, mobile adaptation and base conversion logic.

structure.title: Help with structure
structure.description: We help organize services, blocks and page flow so the website is easier to understand.

copy.title: Refining raw copy
copy.description: We take your drafts, notes and materials and turn them into a clear website presentation.

languages.title: Adaptation into 3 languages
languages.description: We build the Russian, Uzbek and English versions into the project structure from the start.

crm.title: Lead form + CRM
crm.description: We connect lead capture and a basic system where inquiries do not disappear after submission.

hosting.description: We configure the domain and hosting, and their cost is already included in the package.

support.title: 2 months of support

excludedItems.content: Writing all content fully from scratch

Cases.title: Examples of websites we built
Cases.description: These projects show how a website solves a business task through clear presentation, trust, incoming leads and convenient communication.
Cases.ctaTitle: We can break down a similar solution for your business

sellium.title: Sellium
sellium.industry: An AI platform for managing sales on marketplaces in Uzbekistan.
sellium.task: Build a modern tech-style landing page that explains the product clearly, looks convincing and gives visitors a fast path to inquiry.
sellium.ctaText: If you need a website for a digital product or SaaS service, we can break down a similar structure for your scenario.
done: Built a SaaS landing structure focused on product value and usage scenarios.
Prepared a modern visual presentation in a tech-oriented style.
Created a responsive page with a clear inquiry path from key screens.
Launched the project as part of the broader `Growth` package.
result: The client started receiving inquiries from the website on the second day after launch.
sellium.mockInfo1: Presentation built around product value, usage scenarios and clear CTA points.
sellium.mockInfo2: A broader multi-page launch format as a base for product growth.

peaks.title: PEAKS
peaks.industry: A manufacturer of plastic products for B2B clients in Uzbekistan.
peaks.task: Create a corporate landing page for inquiries that looks modern, builds trust and clearly presents the company, production and services.
peaks.ctaText: If you need a corporate website for manufacturing or a B2B company, we can adapt a similar solution to your work format.
done: Built an expanded one-page website for B2B presentation and incoming inquiries.
Structured the key blocks about the company, production and work format.
Prepared a clean corporate visual style focused on trust.
Launched the project in the logic of the `Trust` package with a lead form and convenient contacts.
result: The company got a modern corporate website for presenting its production and receiving incoming inquiries.
peaks.mockTitle: Corporate landing page for B2B manufacturing
peaks.mockInfo1: Focused on trust, service presentation and clear structure for a corporate client.
peaks.mockInfo2: Expanded landing page with a lead form and contact-driven communication.

Testimonials.title: What clients say after launch
Testimonials.description: A short look at how the website feels after launch and what changes for the business.

items.name: Alexey Morozov
items.text: We needed a website that explains the product quickly and does not overload the visitor. In the end we got a focused presentation that made it easier to lead users toward inquiry from the first screen.

items.name: Norkulov Dilmurod
items.text: For a manufacturing company it was important to look reliable and modern. After launch, the website started presenting the business much better, and now we can share it with clients and partners confidently.

items.name: Dilshod Karimov
items.text: It was important for us to look clean and credible. After launch, the website started to feel more professional, and it became easier for patients to understand where to write and how to book.

items.name: Malika Rakhimova
items.text: I liked that everything was assembled in one place. We did not have to deal with the domain, form and messengers separately, and it became much easier to keep track of incoming requests.

items.name: Sardor Yusupov
items.text: Before that we had scattered texts and unclear presentation. Here the structure was rebuilt so the website finally explained clearly what we offer and who it is for.

items.name: Irina Sokolova
items.text: It was important for us to launch several languages at once without making one version feel secondary. In the end, every locale feels complete and comfortable to use.

items.name: Dmitry Orlov
items.text: People used to message us in different places and some requests got lost. Now the path to inquiry is clear, and the messages and form work as one connected system.

items.name: Shahnoza Alimuhamedova
items.text: The best part was that we were not overloaded with technical details. Everything was explained in simple language, and after launch they stayed available for small edits.

items.name: Olga Belova
items.text: We did not need just a nice-looking screen, but a proper corporate presentation. The website now looks much more serious, and we can send it to partners and clients with confidence.

items.name: Madina Ismoilova
items.text: It used to be difficult for me to show my services clearly and briefly. After launch it became easier to explain the value, and the website finally started working like a real presentation.

items.name: Akmal Ruziev
items.text: Everything was delivered in one complete format: the website, lead flow, messengers and the core setup. That mattered because I did not want to coordinate several contractors at once.

items.name: Zarina Sobirova
items.text: I especially liked that the website looks clean on mobile, not only on a laptop. That is critical for our clients because most of them open it from a smartphone.

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.description: Three formats for different goals: landing page development, one-page website, corporate website development and turnkey website launch for business.
Pricing.footerNote: If it is still unclear which format fits your case, leave a request and we will recommend the right option for your business.

startup.title: Launch
startup.audience: For launching a landing page or compact one-page business website fast and starting lead capture without unnecessary complexity.

trust.title: Trust
trust.audience: For an expanded landing page or corporate website with cases, services and a stronger commercial presentation.
items: 1 main page and up to 3 additional pages
Telegram and WhatsApp connected to the website

growth.title: Growth
growth.audience: For a turnkey corporate website with a fuller structure, multilingual setup and a stronger base for future business growth.
items: Telegram and WhatsApp connected to the website

Process.title: How the process works
Process.description: A simple path from request to launch without unnecessary complexity.
Process.cta: Let’s discuss your project and the next step
Process.ctaDescription: We will show where to start, which format fits your business and how to move through the launch clearly and without technical chaos.
Process.note: You do not need a ready technical brief. We help shape the structure, clarify materials and move through the launch step by step.

discussion.title: Discussion
discussion.description: We briefly review your business, website format, goals and the right inquiry flow for your case.

structure.title: Structure and materials
structure.description: We help define the blocks, presentation and what texts, photos or business details are already enough to start.

build.title: Build and setup
build.description: We build the website and connect the form, CRM, Telegram or WhatsApp, domain and the core technical setup.

launch.title: Review and launch
launch.description: We check the key screens, make final edits and publish the website in a working state.

Faq.title: FAQ
Faq.description: Short answers to common questions about website development, landing pages and turnkey launch in Tashkent.
Faq.ctaTitle: If you still have questions, let’s discuss your project
Faq.ctaDescription: We will suggest the right format for your business and show the next step without unnecessary complexity.

start.question: What is needed to get started
start.answer: To start, it is enough to briefly explain your business, services and desired result. Even if your materials are not fully prepared yet, we will help define the right starting point.

structure.question: Do you help with structure and copy
structure.answer: Yes. We help shape the page logic, define the necessary blocks and turn raw copy into a clearer website presentation.

support.question: What is included in 2 months of support
support.answer: Support includes small edits, answers to questions and help with the basic day-to-day use of the website after launch. It is not a separate large development phase, but calm post-launch support.

crm.question: Does a small business need CRM
crm.answer: Yes. Even a small business benefits from not losing inquiries. A basic CRM helps collect leads in one place instead of keeping everything only in chats.

cost.question: How much does website development cost in Tashkent
cost.answer: The cost depends on the format. A landing page or compact one-page website starts from the lower package range, while a fuller corporate website with more structure and integrations costs more. We give the exact estimate after a short discussion.

landing.question: How much does a landing page cost
landing.answer: A landing page usually fits the starter or middle package, depending on the number of sections, multilingual setup, CRM and the integrations you need.

language.question: Can you build a multilingual business website
language.answer: Yes. We can build the website for RU / UZ / EN from the start. If needed, we can also launch one language first and prepare the structure for adding the rest later.

timeline.question: How long does website development take
timeline.answer: A simple landing page can be launched within a few days. A fuller business or corporate website with more pages, CRM and content work takes longer. The exact timeline depends on scope and approval speed.

turnkey.question: What is included in a turnkey website launch
turnkey.answer: A turnkey launch usually includes structure, page build, lead form, CRM, Telegram / WhatsApp integration, domain, hosting, basic SEO setup and launch. The final scope depends on the selected package.

ownership.question: Who owns the domain and website
ownership.answer: The domain is formally owned by our company, but you can always buy it out from us. The domain usually costs around 100,000 to 300,000 UZS. You are always the owner of the website itself. We transfer the code and repository rights to you.

excluded.question: What is not included in the packages
excluded.answer: The base packages do not include logo and brand identity, professional photo shooting, paid third-party services, advertising campaigns, complex custom integrations or writing all content fully from scratch.

payment.question: How does payment work
payment.answer: The payment format is discussed before the start and clarified in advance, so it is clear how the work is structured and in which order the launch moves forward.

later.question: Can the website be improved later
later.answer: Yes. After launch, the website can continue to grow: you can add pages, new blocks, expand the structure and strengthen the functionality as the business grows.

integration.question: Can you connect CRM and Telegram
integration.answer: Yes. We can connect CRM, notifications and Telegram / WhatsApp so incoming leads do not get lost and move into a clear working flow.

LeadSection.title: Leave a request and we will suggest the right website format for your business
LeadSection.description: Leave a short request if you want to discuss website development in Tashkent, compare a landing page, one-page or corporate website format, and get a practical turnkey launch plan for your business. We will review your niche, suggest the best starting point and get back to you within one business day.

contact.telegramDescription: The fastest option if you want to discuss the task directly in chat.
contact.whatsappDescription: A good option if it is more convenient to message from your phone.

LeadSection.footnote: The form is already ready to collect leads. The Notion integration will be connected separately once access data is provided.
